scripts.og: node scripts/og-default.mjs && OUT=public/og-manifeste.png TITLE='Manifeste l0g' SUBTITLE='Sources primaires, code ouvert, auto-hébergement et limites assumées.' EYEBROW='manifeste' COMMAND='cat manifeste.md' CHIPS='sources primaires,code ouvert,aucun tracker' node scripts/og-default.mjs && OUT=public/og-terminal.png TITLE='Terminal l0g' SUBTITLE='Interface de navigation : manifeste, méthodologie, dashboards, API et corpus machine.' EYEBROW='terminal' COMMAND='ssh l0g.fr' CHIPS='terminal,api,llms.txt' node scripts/og-default.mjs && OUT=public/og-status.png TITLE='Statut & intégrité' SUBTITLE='Build statique, snapshots publics, endpoints, corpus machine et hygiène zéro tracker.' EYEBROW='status' COMMAND='cat status.json' CHIPS='build statique,api publique,zéro tracker' node scripts/og-default.mjs && OUT=public/og-donnees.png TITLE='Données l0g' SUBTITLE='Snapshots publics, API JSON, corpus agents, licence et limites de fraîcheur.' EYEBROW='données' COMMAND='curl /api/v1/catalog.json' CHIPS='snapshots,json,llms.txt' node scripts/og-default.mjs && OUT=public/og-protocole-editorial.png TITLE='Protocole éditorial' SUBTITLE='Sources, vérification, niveaux de preuve, corrections et limites de lecture.' EYEBROW='protocole' COMMAND='cat protocole-editorial.md' CHIPS='sources,preuve,correction' node scripts/og-default.mjs && OUT=public/og-changelog-editorial.png TITLE='Changelog éditorial' SUBTITLE='Journal des changements de protocole, sources, données, méthode et traçabilité.' EYEBROW='changelog' COMMAND='git log --editorial' CHIPS='traçabilité,méthode,sources' node scripts/og-default.mjs && node scripts/og-generate.mjs && POSTS_DIR=src/content/guides node scripts/og-generate.mjs
scripts.build: npm run risk:update && npm run test:risk-snapshot && astro build && npm run test:agent-surface && pagefind --site dist
